extract_text_from_pdf.name: extract_text_from_pdf
extract_text_from_pdf.description: Extracts text or specific patterns (invoice numbers, dates, amounts) from PDF. Use when user says: extract from PDF, get invoice number, find text in PDF, read PDF.

pattern.description: Optional regex pattern to extract specific text

extract_text_from_word.name: extract_text_from_word
extract_text_from_word.description: Extracts text or specific patterns from Word document. Use when user says: extract from Word, get text from doc, read Word file.

fill_word_template.name: fill_word_template
fill_word_template.description: Fills a Word template by replacing {{placeholders}} with actual data. Use when user says: fill template, populate document, insert data into Word.

format_word_text.name: format_word_text
format_word_text.description: Changes font, size, color, or style in Word document. Use when user says: change font, make bold, color text, format Word.

input_data_to_excel.name: input_data_to_excel
input_data_to_excel.description: Inputs data into Excel cells and triggers formula recalculation. Use when user says: put data in Excel, write to cells, update Excel, fill cells.

refresh_pivot_table.name: refresh_pivot_table
refresh_pivot_table.description: Refreshes pivot tables in Excel. Use when user says: refresh pivot, update pivot table, recalculate pivot.

excel_path.description: Path to Excel file with pivot tables

pdf_to_excel.name: pdf_to_excel
pdf_to_excel.description: Extracts data from PDF and inputs it into Excel. Use when user says: PDF to Excel, extract invoice to Excel, get data from PDF to spreadsheet.

web_to_excel.name: web_to_excel
web_to_excel.description: Extracts data from webpage and inputs it into Excel. Use when user says: web to Excel, scrape website to spreadsheet, get data from URL to Excel.

convert_file_format.name: convert_file_format
convert_file_format.description: Converts files between formats (Excel to PDF, CSV to XLSX, Word to PDF, etc). Use when user says: convert to PDF, save as Excel, change format, export as.

target_format.description: Target format: pdf, xlsx, csv, docx
